title: Associate, Health Information Management System (2-year contract)
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Ensure timely processing of medical reports and related requests in accordance with set guidelines and procedures
  • Responsible and accountable for all monetary transactions pertaining to the processing of these request
  • Monitor and track completion of the required reports and liaise with clinical departments and patients / customers to facilitate the completion of the requests
  • Attend to public enquiries through email and phone. Reply to emails and follow through on online services within the stipulated timeframe
  • Attend to walk-in patients’ enquiries and assist with their medical report applications. Assist with logistics such as mail dispatch and collection, and update records status in the relevant system accordingly
  • Any other duties assigned from time to time

Working hours:

  • Monday to Thursday: 8.30am – 6.00pm
  • Friday: 8.30am – 5.30pm

Requirements:

  • Minimum GCE ‘O’/’A’Level, or ITE Certificates in any general discipline
  • Candidates without relevant experience are welcome to apply as on-the-job training will be provided
  • Knowledgeable with Microsoft Office and computer literacy
  • Good interpersonal and communication skills

postedCompany.description:
Changi General Hospital (CGH) is a trusted healthcare provider with over 1000 beds in eastern Singapore.  We provide a comprehensive range of medical specialties. CGH offers the entire gamut of medical services, from general surgery, internal medicine,  cardiology, ENT to orthopaedic surgery and dermatology. Our peaks of medical excellence are represented by the Integrated Sleep Service, Breast Centre @ changi, Endoscopy Centre, Diabetes Centre, Geriatric Centre and the Changi Sports Medicine Centre.  Changi Sports Medicine Centre is Singapore’s largest and is a leading provider of sports medicine expertise.

CGH is dedicated to improving the health of the community in the east and to provide excellence and compassion in service and care.  To improve care for patients, it has adopted a proactive integrated care approach.  Partnering with healthcare providers in the east, it is bringing disease management programmes and disease prevention programmes to patients’ doorstep.
postedCompany.name: CHANGI GENERAL HOSPITAL PTE LTD
